## [00:00 - 02:24]

This is the pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer. And today we're going to talk about how my impact on Instagram grew thanks to Reels. Let's go. Here's the impact of publishing more than 250 Reels to Instagram in six months. I started my short form video journey on October 1st of 2022. Before that, I was a bad Instagram user. Organically, I had created only 16 videos on Instagram up until that point. Most of my posts otherwise were of my kids or my dog. Instead, I mostly used Instagram as an ad placement. So what happened once I started posting a reel nearly every single day? Compared to the prior six months, my Instagram reach went up 916%. My profile visits went up 279%. And my Instagram followers went up 1300%. Some context there. I added 2,830 followers during these six months. During the prior six months, it was only 202. What's crazy is the amount of work to accomplish this is close to nothing. The videos themselves take work. Don't get me wrong. But Instagram is simply one of six platforms that I publish the same video to. I really don't spend a whole bunch of time on Instagram. This is more evidence that it's okay to be everywhere. And it's okay to publish the same content to multiple platforms as long as it works. Because the alternative for me is to be inactive on Instagram. Instead, it's becoming one of my more important sources of business. I hope you enjoyed this episode of the Pubcast with John Loomer. This was a shot, which is a shorter episode. Sometimes shots take from short form videos that I create on TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, and elsewhere. And sometimes, like here, I record a shot just for the Pubcast. Of course, we also have longer episodes that I try to publish once or twice per month. So if you enjoyed this, don't forget to subscribe, rate, and review. And drop me a message. Let me know what challenges you're facing at John at JohnLoomer.com. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out. Bye.
